intro.control.copy_paste_cut: Control+C/V/X are Copy, Paste and cut respectively.
intro.material.hover: To choose a material, hover over one of the icons on the right, it will show a selection of elements in that group.
intro.material.pick: Pick your material from the menu using mouse left/right buttons.
intro.draw.freeform: Draw freeform lines by dragging your mouse left/right button across the drawing area.
intro.draw.straight: Shift+drag will create straight lines of particles.
intro.draw.rectangles: Ctrl+drag will result in filled rectangles.
intro.draw.flood_fill: Ctrl+Shift+click will flood-fill a closed area.
intro.tool.size: Use the mouse scroll wheel, or '[' and ']', to change the tool size for particles.
intro.tool.sample: Middle click or Alt+Click to "sample" the particles.
intro.zoom.tool: Use 'Z' for a zoom tool. Click to make the drawable zoom window stay around. Use the wheel to change the zoom strength.
intro.sim.pause: The spacebar can be used to pause physics. Use 'F' to step ahead by one frame.
intro.save.stamps: Use 'S' to save parts of the window as 'stamps'. 'L' loads the most recent stamp, 'K' shows a library of stamps you saved.
intro.screenshot: Use 'P' to take a screenshot and save it into the current directory.
intro.hud.debug: Use 'H' to toggle the HUD. Use 'D' to toggle debug mode in the HUD.
intro.beta.warning: This is a BETA, you cannot save things publicly, nor open local saves and stamps made with it in older versions.
intro.beta.publish: If you are planning on publishing any saves, use the release version.
intro.online.register: To use online features such as saving, you need to register at:
options.title: Options
options.heat_simulation.info: Can cause odd behaviour when disabled
options.newtonian_gravity.info: May cause poor performance on older computers
options.ambient_heat_simulation.info: Can cause odd / broken behaviour with many saves
options.water_equalisation.info: May cause poor performance with a lot of water
options.window_scale: Window scale factor for larger screens
options.resizable: Resizable \bg- allow resizing and maximizing window
options.blurry_scaling: Blurry scaling \bg- more blurry, better on very big screens
options.fast_quit.info: Always exit completely when hitting close
options.show_avatars.info: Disable if you have a slow connection
options.perfect_circle.info: Better circle brush, without incorrect points on edges
options.grave_exits_console.info: Disable if that key is 0 on your keyboard
options.platform_clipboard.info: Allows copying and pasting across TPT instances
options.threaded_rendering.info: May increase framerate when fancy effects are in use
options.deco_space: Colour space used by decoration tools
options.migrate_confirm_body_1: This will migrate all stamps, saves, and scripts from
options.migrate_confirm_body_2: to the shared data directory at
options.migrate_confirm_body_3: Files that already exist will not be overwritten.
options.fetch_motd: Fetch the message of the day and notifications
options.redirect_std: Save errors and other messages to a file
options.redirect_std.info: Developers may ask for this when trying to fix problems
options.credits_desc: - Find out who contributed to TPT
render.mode.effe: Adds Special flare effects to some elements
render.mode.blob: Makes everything be drawn like a blob
render.mode.basic: Basic rendering, without this, most things will be invisible
render.display.airc: Displays pressure as red and blue, and velocity as white
render.display.airp: Displays pressure, red is positive and blue is negative
render.display.airv: Displays velocity and positive pressure: up/down adds blue, right/left adds red, still pressure adds green
render.display.airh: Displays the temperature of the air like heat display does
render.display.airw: Displays vorticity, red is clockwise and blue is anticlockwise
render.display.warp: Gravity lensing, Newtonian Gravity bends light with this on
render.display.effe: Enables moving solids, stickmen guns, and premium(tm) graphics
render.display.pers: Element paths persist on the screen for a while
render.colour.heat: Displays temperatures of the elements, dark blue is coldest, pink is hottest
render.colour.life: Displays the life value of elements in greyscale gradients
render.colour.grad: Changes colors of elements slightly to show heat diffusing through them
render.colour.basic: No special effects at all for anything, overrides all other options and deco
sim.tool.DEFAULT_TOOL_NGRV: Creates a short-lasting negative gravity well.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_AMTR: Anti-Matter, destroys a majority of particles.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ANAR: Anti-air. Very light gravity-defying dust. Burns cold instead of hot.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ARAY: Ray Emitter. Rays create points when they collide.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BCOL: Broken Coal. Heavy particles, burns slowly.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BGLA: Broken Glass, heavy particles formed when glass breaks under pressure. Meltable. Bagels.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BHOL: Vacuum, sucks in other particles and heats up.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BIZR: Bizarre... contradicts the normal state changes. Paints other elements with its deco color.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BMTL: Breakable metal. Common conductive building material, can melt and break under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BOMB: Bomb. Explodes and destroys all surrounding particles when it touches something.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BOYL: Boyle, variable pressure gas. Expands when heated.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BRAY: Ray Point. Rays create points when they collide.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BREC: Broken electronics. Formed from EMP blasts, and when constantly sparked while under pressure, turns to EXOT.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_BRMT: Broken metal. Created when iron rusts or when metals break from pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_C5: Cold explosive, set off by anything cold.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CLNE: Clone. Duplicates any particles it touches.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CLST: Clay dust. Produces paste when mixed with water.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CNCT: Concrete. Can stack on itself or ROCK, collapses with pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CO2: Carbon Dioxide. Heavy gas, drifts downwards. Carbonates water and turns to dry ice when cold.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_COAL: Coal, Burns very slowly. Gets red when hot.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CONV: Converter. Converts everything into whatever it first touches.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_CRAY: Particle Ray Emitter. Creates a beam of particles set by its ctype, with a range set by tmp.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DESL: Liquid diesel. Explodes under high pressure and temperatures.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DEST: More destructive Bomb, can break through virtually anything.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DEUT: Deuterium oxide. Gets more concentrated when cold, explodes with neutrons or protons.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DMG: Generates damaging pressure and breaks any elements it hits.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DRAY: Duplicator ray. Replicates a line of particles in front of it.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DRIC: Dry Ice, formed when CO2 is cooled.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DSTW: Distilled water, does not conduct electricity.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_DTEC: Detector, creates a spark when something with its ctype is nearby.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ELEC: Electrons. Sparks electronics, reacts with NEUT and WATR.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ETRD: Electrode. Creates plasma arcs with electricity. (Use sparingly)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_EXOT: Exotic matter. Explodes with excess exposure to electrons. Has many other odd reactions.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FIGH: Fighter. Tries to kill stickmen. You must first give it an element to kill him with.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FILT: Filter. Changes color of PHOT and BIZR. Color depends on temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FIRW: Fireworks! Colorful, set off by fire.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FOG: Fog, created when an electric current is passed through RIME.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FRAY: Force Emitter. Pushes or pulls objects based on its temperature. Use like ARAY.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FRME: Frame, can be used with pistons to push many particles.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FRZW: Freeze water. Hybrid liquid formed when Freeze powder melts.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FRZZ: Freeze powder. When melted, forms ice that always cools. Spreads with regular water.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FSEP: Fuse Powder. Burns slowly like FUSE.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FUSE: Burns slowly. Ignites at very high temperatures or when sparked.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_FWRK: Original version of fireworks, activated by heat/neutrons.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GAS: Diffuses quickly and is flammable. Liquefies into OIL under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GBMB: Gravity bomb. Sticks to the first object it touches then produces a strong gravity push.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GEL: A liquid with variable viscosity and heat conductivity. Absorbs water.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GLAS: Glass. Meltable. Shatters under pressure, and refracts photons.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GOLD: Corrosion resistant metal, will reverse corrosion of iron. Excellent conductor.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GPMP: Gravity pump. Changes gravity to its temp when activated. (use HEAT/COOL)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GRAV: Very light dust. Changes colour based on velocity.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_GUNP: Gunpowder. Light dust, explodes on contact with fire or spark.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_H2: Hydrogen. Combusts with OXYG to make WATR. Undergoes fusion at high temperature and pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_HSWC: Heat switch. Conducts heat only when activated.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ICEI: Crushes under pressure. Cools down air.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_IGNT: Ignition cord. Burns slowly with fire and sparks.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_INSL: Insulator. Blocks heat, electricity, and radiation.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_INST: Instantly conducts, PSCN to charge, NSCN to take.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_INVIS: Invisible under pressure, allowing particles through.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_INWR: Insulated wire. Only conducts to PSCN, NSCN, WIFI, and SWCH.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_IRON: Rusts with salt, can be used for electrolysis of WATR.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ISOZ: Isotope-Z. Radioactive liquid, decays into photons when touching PHOT or under negative pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_ISZS: Solid form of ISOZ, slowly decays into PHOT.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LAVA: Molten lava. Ignites flammable materials. Generated when metals and other materials melt, solidifies when cold.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LCRY: Liquid Crystal. Changes colour when charged. (PSCN Charges, NSCN Discharges)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LDTC: Linear detector. Scans in 8 directions for particles with its ctype and creates a spark on the opposite side.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LIGH: Lightning. Change the brush size to set the size of the lightning.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LITH: Lithium. Reactive element that explodes on contact with water.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LNTG: Liquid Nitrogen. Very cold, disappears whenever it touches anything warmer.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LO2: Liquid Oxygen. Very cold. Reacts with fire.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_LSNS: Life sensor, creates a spark when there's a nearby particle with a life higher than its temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_MERC: Mercury. Volume changes with temperature, Conductive.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_MWAX: Liquid Wax. Hardens into WAX at 45 degrees.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NBHL: Black hole, sucks in particles using gravity. (Requires Newtonian gravity)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NBLE: Noble Gas. Ionizes into plasma when sparked. Diffuses.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NEUT: Neutrons. Interact with matter in odd ways.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NICE: Nitrogen Ice. Very cold, will melt into LN2 when heated only slightly.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NITR: Nitroglycerin. Pressure sensitive explosive. Mix with CLST to make TNT.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NSCN: N-Type Silicon, Will not transfer current to P-Type Silicon. Disables powered materials.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NTCT: NTC Thermistor. Conducts with PSCN and NSCN, but only when heated above 100C.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_NWHL: White hole, pushes away other particles with gravity. (Requires Newtonian gravity)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_OIL: Flammable, turns into GAS at low pressure or high temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PCLN: Powered clone. When activated, duplicates any particles it touches.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PHOT: Photons. Refract through glass, and different elements change its color. Can ignite flammable materials.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PIPE: PIPE, moves particles around. Once the BRCK generates, erase some for the exit. Then the PIPE generates and is usable.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PLUT: Plutonium. Heavy, fissile particles. Generates neutrons under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_POLO: Polonium, highly radioactive. Decays into NEUT and heats up.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PPIP: Powered version of PIPE, use PSCN/NSCN to Activate/Deactivate.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PQRT: Powdered quartz, broken form of QRTZ.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PROT: Protons. Transfer heat to materials, and remove sparks.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PRTI: Portal IN. Particles go in here. Also has temperature dependent channels. (same as WIFI)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PRTO: Portal OUT. Particles come out here. Also has temperature dependent channels. (same as WIFI)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PSCN: P-Type Silicon, Will transfer current to any conductor. Enables powered materials.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PSNS: Pressure sensor, creates a spark when the pressure is greater than its temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PSTN: Piston, pushes particles. PSCN extends, NSCN retracts
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PTCT: PTC Thermistor. Conducts with PSCN and NSCN, but only when cooled below 100C.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PUMP: Pressure pump. Changes pressure to its temp when activated. (use HEAT/COOL).
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_PVOD: Powered VOID. When activated, destroys entering particles.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_QRTZ: Quartz, breakable mineral. Conducts but becomes brittle when cold. Scatters photons.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RBDM: Rubidium. Explosive, especially on contact with water. Low melting point.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RFRG: Refrigerant. Heats up and liquefies under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RIME: Solid, created when steam cools rapidly and goes through deposition, skipping the liquid phase.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RPEL: Repels or attracts particles based on its temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RSSS: Solidified resist. Blocks pressure and insulates electricity. Liquefies on contact with neutrons.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_RSST: Resist. Solidifies on contact with photons, is destroyed by electrons and spark.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SAND: Sand, Heavy particles. Melts into glass.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SEED: Seeds. Put on sand and add water to grow a tree.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SHLD1: Shield. Grows around spark, broken by pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SING: Singularity. Creates huge amounts of negative pressure and destroys everything.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SLCN: Powdered Silicon. A key ingredient in producing multiple materials.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SLTW: Saltwater, conducts electricity, difficult to freeze.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SNOW: Light particles. Created when ICE breaks under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SOAP: Soap. Creates bubbles, washes off deco color, and cures virus.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SPNG: Sponge, absorbs water. Is not a moving solid.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SPRK: Electricity. The basis of all electronics in TPT, travels along conductive elements.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_STKM: Stickman. Don't kill him! Control with the arrow keys.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_STKM2: Second stickman. Don't kill him! Control with wasd.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_STOR: Storage. Captures and stores a single particle. Releases when charged with PSCN, also passes to PIPE.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_SWCH: Switch. Only conducts when switched on. (PSCN switches on, NSCN switches off)
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_TESC: Tesla coil! Creates lightning when sparked.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_THDR: Lightning! Very hot, inflicts damage upon most materials, and transfers current to metals.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_THRM: Thermite. Burns into extremely hot molten metal.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_TRON: Smart particles, Travels in straight lines and avoids obstacles. Grows with time.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_TSNS: Temperature sensor, creates a spark when there's a nearby particle with a greater temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_TTAN: Titanium. Higher melting temperature than most other metals, blocks all air pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_TUNG: Tungsten. Brittle metal with a very high melting point.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_URAN: Uranium. Heavy particles. Generates heat under pressure.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VIBR: Vibranium. Stores energy and releases it in violent explosions.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VIRS: Virus. Turns everything it touches into virus.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VOID: Hole, will drain away any particles.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VRSG: Gas Virus. Turns everything it touches into virus.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VRSS: Solid Virus. Turns everything it touches into virus.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_VSNS: Velocity sensor, creates a spark when there's a nearby particle with velocity higher than its temperature.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_WATR: Water. Conducts electricity, freezes, and extinguishes fires.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_WAX: Flammable, melts at moderately high temperatures.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_WHOL: Air vent, creates pressure and pushes other particles away.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_WIFI: Wireless transmitter, transfers spark to any other wifi on the same temperature channel.
sim.elem.DEFAULT_PT_WIRE: WireWorld wires, conducts based on a set of GOL-like rules.
